name_cn:
Genuine quality
SERPENTI BAIA series—A high-visual-appeal crossbody bag, equipped with two detachable serpentine thick chains and an extra chain attachment~The shoulder strap can be lengthened at will to achieve multiple wearing styles. Equipped with a sheepskin small pouch and a rain cover.
Dimensions:27.5x18 x3.5cm
Model:293208
